rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LINDA GUARAGLIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Order revised to allow but not approve the distribution from the estate without prior court approval. Also, this court does not discharge the personal representative in the order for final distribution. After receipts are filed, petitioner must drop off an ex parte petition for final discharge.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE NARRON FAMILY TRUST DATED 4/22/1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, May 8, 2013, Line 29, PETITIONER LISA DEJOHN's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. The motion is denied. Claimant has failed to meet her burden to show that the funds levied upon are traceable to social security or public pension payments. Rental income is not exempt. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. =(302/PJB)
